positive: A minimalist, abstract representation of a celestial body rising over a calm, geometric landscape. The main subject is a stylized, crescent-shaped moon emitting soft, bioluminescent light that interacts with sharp, deep indigo and royal blue tonal gradients. The landscape elements should be composed of clean, interlocking geometric shapes (triangles, trapezoids, arches) rendered in deep teal and obsidian black, creating a strong contrast with the glowing lunar glow. Focus on negative space and flat, graphic composition, suitable for high-contrast screen printing on fabric. Line art quality, ultra-clean vector graphic, synthwave vaporwave aesthetic, symmetrical composition, perfect symmetry, high detail, graphic novel style, designed for apparel print.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, logo, copyright, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, photo-realistic, grimy, grunge, poor shading, clutter, messy lines
